{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":400}","has_more":false,"total":5},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610596570098516798","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"高天远观的小说写的很好，很值得一读，希望作者写出更多更好的作品，为作者点赞。👍👍👍👍👍👍🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771982519,"group_id":"7459386857034370073","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0i8WOYVz9FkTAXnABR4Urk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"229145419450868","user_name":"爱吃红丝绒曲奇的墨宝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"229145419450868","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459386857034370073","book_info":{"abstract":"【数十次反转+古风权谋+高智商博弈+离奇探案+极快节奏+多重反转+烧脑反转+暗道解密+细节刻画+架空历史+悬疑推理+IP向】
在穿越成为了县丞之后，在机缘巧合之下，宋以湛开始了一连串离奇之案的曲折调查，而原先根本就不被县衙内众人看好的他，却也逐渐开启了一条逆袭之路，并且成为了声名远扬的一个神探！
但一场源自于朝廷内部的权谋之争随之悄然而来，实际上这些不断发生的离奇之案都与朝廷的这场权谋之争有莫大关系，但似乎这场权谋之争本身会更加的神秘，其结果也是更加的令人意想不到……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o650dec0e3d85e0fbc9ddcde096abc1b9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"高天远观","author_id":"","book_id":"7459386857034370073","book_name":"县衙有个神探","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c0a090","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2233人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7459387000676680217","read_count":"2233","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"300980"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"160","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o650dec0e3d85e0fbc9ddcde096abc1b9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779453609&x-signature=w4mJedPWB1YlXeuOeMJx1ZTkZR8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2984552083232537","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1896"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读218小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":785933,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":786163,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":116},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"sti
